feedback.text: Card providers should never have the possibility to control consumers. What Mastercard and Visa are trying to do is simply manipulating shops to respond to requests from interest groups who do not know everyone and the video game industry and want to censor everything they disagree with. If there is any product that may cause controversy, it must be brought to legal proceedings to determine whether it does not comply with the legal statutes and after thorough deliberation to say whether or not it can be disseminated, otherwise it is an autocratic system determined by payment networks that can unilaterally extinguish freedom of expression.
